review.notes: First AI-assisted expert draft completed across all 12 calibration windows. Keep this release for development calibration only until an independent market-structure reviewer adjudicates the labels.

draft_methodology.important_limitation: These labels are an AI-assisted expert calibration draft, not independently adjudicated human ground truth.

split_policy.note: The AI-assisted draft has no locked test set. Validation is later in time and must not be used for repeated parameter search.
